channel.title: HackTheBox on Shang
channel.description: Recent content in HackTheBox on Shang

item.title: Unified
item.description: Completed on 04/09/2022 | OS: Linux Tools used: nmap, burp-suite, netcat, ssh Enumeration First, we will use the Nmap tool to scan the website for information such as ports, services, servers, and vulnerabilities on this server. # Nmap 7.92 scan initiated Sun Sep 4 11:35:47 2022 as: nmap -sV -sC -oN unified.txt 10.129.94.222 Nmap scan report for 10.129.94.222 Host is up (0.069s latency). Not shown: 996 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.
